title: Promise to Self: No New Phone For A Year
content:
I bought a new phone again, the SE K750i. Last time I bought the SE Z800i was 6/25, only 4 months ago. Eventhough I have a fairly acceptable excuse to buy a new phone (Z800i was a bit shaky lately and the keypad is dying), I still think that I've been spending too much on cellphones.

So here I make a promise to myself, **I will not buy a new phone for __a year__ or until the K750i is unusably broken, whichever takes longer.**

So help me God!

--

3/6/2006: As it turns out, I can't keep this promise. I just bought a Nokia N70. Bad Bad.
